items.summary: Create comprehensive documentation explaining the backend folder structure related to Assessment and Wellness Reports, including the purpose and function of each folder and file
Document the data models used for Assessment and Wellness Reports, including SectionId, SectionScores, MedicalHistory, UserAnswers, SolutionTip, and CompleteWellnessReport types
Document available backend functions and API endpoints for wellness reports, including storage operations, ID generation, and data retrieval methods
Create a visual representation or structured outline showing how the backend components interact to generate and store wellness reports
